# ThinkerCare Group

> ThinkerCare Group is a creative & production collective based in Algiers that transforms ideas into brands and products. Core capabilities include brand strategy, product design & prototyping, creative production, and small-to-medium scale manufacturing. Use the links below for up-to-date portfolio items, team info, and contact.

Important notes:
- The site primarily surfaces creative work, product/brand projects, and production updates via social and company profiles.
- If short context is required, use the "Priority" sections first; the "Optional" section may be skipped for a brief context.
- All links are public resources; verify against official contact channels before making legal or commercial decisions.

## Priority / Company profiles
- [LinkedIn — ThinkerCare Group](https://www.linkedin.com/company/thinkercare-group): Company profile, team posts, and high-level company description.
- [Instagram — thinkercaregroup](https://www.instagram.com/thinkercaregroup/): Portfolio, project photos, reels, and location details (Algiers).

## Priority / Leadership
- [Oussama Hamouche — LinkedIn (CEO / Founder)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oussama-hamouche-62ba83198): Founder / public profile.

## Projects & Manufacturing evidence
- [Instagram post showing industrial equipment / OMAS machine](https://www.instagram.com/p/DKQJFz5MhSt/): Example post demonstrating manufacturing/production capability and machinery ownership.
- [Instagram reel — recent shoots & productions](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DObmBUVj2A4/): Example of media/creative production work.

## Contact & Business inquiries
- Email: contact@thinkercaregroup.com  
- Primary public contact channels: LinkedIn company page and Instagram DMs (see profiles above).  
- For verified legal / commercial contact details, prefer information found on official company pages or via their LinkedIn business contact card.

## Policies & Legal
- No dedicated public privacy / terms / press kit page detected at root — check the company LinkedIn or contact them directly for legal/policy materials.

## Optional
- [Instagram — acquisitions / business highlights feed](https://www.instagram.com/p/DI9MGakI2cj/): Business milestone post.
- [Company social media archive / reels](https://www.instagram.com/thinkercaregroup/reels/): Additional portfolio items and short-form updates.
